subcodes.first_line: O servant! Hast thou tarried in the Cause after that which calleth unto all things, bidding them hasten with their hearts unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد هل توقفت علی الامر بعد الذی ینادی الاشیا ان اسرعوا بالقلوب الی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @call to action, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
